moments.title: Wimbledon Finals Week
moments.blurb: The second week of The Championships, Wimbledon, is underway, with today featuring the Fourth Round matches. The tournament concludes on July 12.

angles.name: Centre Court Drama
angles.copy: Who's making it to the quarter-finals? It's Fourth Round Sunday at Wimbledon, and the tension is building. Every serve, every volley, every point matters now.

angles.name: British Hopes
angles.copy: Are you glued to the screen? Wimbledon is in full swing, and British players are fighting for a spot in the later rounds. Let's hear it for our home talent!

moments.title: Tour de France Kicks Off
moments.blurb: The 2026 Tour de France began yesterday, July 4th, with cyclists now battling through the early stages of the iconic race until July 26th.

angles.name: Yellow Jersey Chase
angles.copy: The greatest show on two wheels is off! The Tour de France is underway. Who are you backing for the Yellow Jersey this year?

angles.name: Early Stages
angles.copy: Gruelling climbs and thrilling sprints have already begun. Catch the highlights from the opening days of the Tour de France.

moments.title: Metallica Live in London
moments.blurb: Heavy metal legends Metallica play their second of two London Stadium shows today as part of their M72 World Tour.

angles.name: Metal Mayhem
angles.copy: London, are you ready for round two? Metallica are back at the London Stadium tonight for their second 'No Repeat Weekend' show. Expect a different setlist, same legendary energy!

angles.name: Headbanging in London
angles.copy: For those lucky enough to be at London Stadium tonight, Metallica are bringing the thunder! What's your favourite Metallica track you hope to hear?

moments.title: Wolf Alice Headline Finsbury Park
moments.blurb: North London indie darlings Wolf Alice play their biggest headline show to date at Finsbury Park today, with special guests including The Last Dinner Party.

angles.name: Indie Royalty
angles.copy: Wolf Alice take over Finsbury Park today for what's set to be an epic headline show. Who's heading down to see the indie icons?

angles.name: London Calling
angles.copy: From Camden to Finsbury Park, Wolf Alice are celebrating their biggest show yet in their hometown. What a moment for British indie!

moments.title: Happy 57th to RZA
moments.blurb: RZA, the mastermind behind Wu-Tang Clan, turns 57 today. The producer, rapper, and actor was born on July 5, 1969.

angles.name: Wu-Tang Forever
angles.copy: Happy 57th Birthday to the Abbot himself, RZA! The architect of the Wu-Tang sound, what's your favourite RZA-produced track?

angles.name: Hip-Hop Icon
angles.copy: From Staten Island to the world, RZA's influence on hip-hop is undeniable. Celebrating his 57th today, a true innovator.

moments.title: Love Island Continues
moments.blurb: ITV2's hit reality show Love Island is providing daily drama and romance from the villa as the summer series continues.

angles.name: Villa Drama
angles.copy: Another day, another dose of drama from the Love Island villa. Who's coupling up, and who's getting pied off tonight?

angles.name: Summer Vibes
angles.copy: Beyond the bombshells and recouplings, Love Island is setting the soundtrack to our summer nights. What's your favourite moment from the villa so far?

moments.title: 50 Cent Turns 51
moments.blurb: Grammy-winning rapper and entrepreneur 50 Cent, born Curtis Jackson, celebrates his 51st birthday on July 6th.

angles.name: Go Shorty, It's Your Birthday
angles.copy: Tomorrow, we're wishing a very Happy 51st Birthday to the one and only 50 Cent! Get Rich or Die Tryin' is still a classic.

angles.name: Candy Shop King
angles.copy: From chart-topping hits to TV screens, 50 Cent has done it all. Celebrating his 51st tomorrow, what's your favourite track?

moments.title: Ringo Starr's 86th Birthday
moments.blurb: The legendary drummer for The Beatles, Ringo Starr, will celebrate his 86th birthday on July 7th.

angles.name: Peace & Love for Ringo
angles.copy: All we need is peace and love! On Tuesday, we're sending huge Happy 86th Birthday wishes to the iconic Ringo Starr.

angles.name: Beatles Legend
angles.copy: From the Cavern Club to global superstardom, Ringo's beat is timeless. What's your favourite Beatles track featuring his iconic drumming?

moments.title: Beck Turns 56
moments.blurb: Experimental rock and indie icon Beck, born Beck David Hansen, celebrates his 56th birthday on July 8th.

angles.name: Loser to Legend
angles.copy: Wednesday marks the 56th Birthday of the incredibly versatile Beck! From 'Loser' to multi-Grammy winner, his sound is truly unique.

angles.name: Genre Bender
angles.copy: Happy Birthday to Beck on July 8th! Which of his many musical styles - folk, funk, hip-hop, rock - is your favourite?

moments.title: Courtney Love's 62nd Birthday
moments.blurb: Grunge icon and Hole frontwoman Courtney Love celebrates her 62nd birthday on July 9th.

angles.name: Hole's Queen
angles.copy: Thursday, July 9th, marks Courtney Love's 62nd Birthday! The fearless frontwoman of Hole, what's your go-to track from her?

angles.name: Grunge Royalty
angles.copy: A true force in alternative music, Happy Birthday to Courtney Love! Her impact on 90s rock is undeniable.

moments.title: Jack White Turns 51
moments.blurb: Grammy-winning musician Jack White, known for The White Stripes and his prolific solo work, celebrates his 51st birthday on July 9th.

angles.name: Garage Rock Genius
angles.copy: Happy 51st Birthday to the incredible Jack White on Thursday! From The White Stripes to his solo projects, he's a true guitar hero.

angles.name: Iconic Sound
angles.copy: Celebrating the birthday of Jack White on July 9th! What's your favourite riff or song from his amazing career?

moments.title: Jessica Simpson's 46th Birthday
moments.blurb: Singer, actress, and fashion designer Jessica Simpson celebrates her 46th birthday on July 10th.

angles.name: Pop Princess to Mogul
angles.copy: Wishing a Happy 46th Birthday to Jessica Simpson on Friday! From 'I Wanna Love You Forever' to building an empire, she's done it all.

angles.name: Reality Star Throwback
angles.copy: Remember the 'Newlyweds' days? Happy Birthday to Jessica Simpson on July 10th! What's your favourite Jessica memory?

moments.title: Perrie Edwards Turns 33
moments.blurb: Little Mix star Perrie Edwards celebrates her 33rd birthday on July 10th.

angles.name: Little Mix Powerhouse
angles.copy: Friday is Perrie Edwards' 33rd Birthday! From Little Mix to her solo ventures, she's a true pop force.

angles.name: Pop Icon
angles.copy: Happy Birthday to Perrie Edwards on July 10th! What's your favourite Little Mix hit or Perrie moment?

moments.title: Suzanne Vega's 67th Birthday
moments.blurb: Folk-pop singer-songwriter Suzanne Vega, known for hits like 'Luka' and 'Tom's Diner', celebrates her 67th birthday on July 11th.

angles.name: Mother of the MP3
angles.copy: Saturday, July 11th, is Suzanne Vega's 67th Birthday! Did you know 'Tom's Diner' was used to test the MP3 format?

angles.name: Timeless Folk-Pop
angles.copy: Happy Birthday to the distinctive voice of Suzanne Vega! What's your favourite of her poetic tracks?

moments.title: Richie Sambora Turns 67
moments.blurb: Former Bon Jovi guitarist and co-songwriter Richie Sambora celebrates his 67th birthday on July 11th.

angles.name: Bon Jovi Legend
angles.copy: Livin' on a Prayer for Richie Sambora's 67th Birthday on Saturday! The iconic Bon Jovi guitarist, what's your favourite solo?

angles.name: Guitar Hero
angles.copy: Happy Birthday to Richie Sambora on July 11th! A true rock legend, whose riffs defined an era.

moments.title: System Of A Down in London
moments.blurb: Nu-metal pioneers System Of A Down play their first of two London shows at Tottenham Hotspur Stadium on July 13th.

angles.name: Chop Suey! Live
angles.copy: Get ready, London! System Of A Down are bringing their unique sound to Tottenham Hotspur Stadium this Monday. Who's going?

angles.name: Nu-Metal Icons
angles.copy: It's been a long wait, but System Of A Down are finally back in London for two huge shows next week. Expect an unforgettable night!

moments.title: Linda Ronstadt's 80th Birthday
moments.blurb: Grammy-winning singer Linda Ronstadt, a versatile artist known for her work across rock, folk, country, and pop, turns 80 on July 15th.

angles.name: First Lady of Rock
angles.copy: On Wednesday, July 15th, we celebrate the 80th Birthday of the incredible Linda Ronstadt! A voice that defined generations.

angles.name: Musical Chameleon
angles.copy: Happy 80th Birthday to Linda Ronstadt! Her ability to master rock, country, pop, and more makes her a true legend.

moments.title: Latest UK Singles Chart
moments.blurb: The Official UK Singles Chart for July 3rd, 2026, was released on Friday, featuring new entries and climbers.

angles.name: Chart Talk
angles.copy: The latest Official UK Singles Chart is out! Who's holding strong at the top, and what new tracks are making a splash?

angles.name: New Music Friday Recap
angles.copy: Catch up on the latest chart movements from Friday's Official Singles Chart release. Any surprises in the Top 40?

moments.title: Summer School Holiday Mood
moments.blurb: While many schools break up later in July, the feeling of summer holidays is definitely in the air across the UK.

angles.name: Summer's Here
angles.copy: It's officially July, and the summer holiday feeling is kicking in! Are you planning a staycation or heading off somewhere sunny?

angles.name: School's Out (Soon)
angles.copy: For many, the countdown to the summer break is on! What are your plans for soaking up the sun and making the most of the long days?
